prompt: A highly detailed, isometric 3D miniature diorama map of Chongqing, blending traditional Chinese architecture with modern skyscrapers, set against a vintage parchment map background. The scene features a winding river with a modern bridge connecting a densely packed peninsula of high-rises to older, multi-tiered traditional buildings glowing with warm light. A monorail train curves along a track near the water. Key landmarks are labeled with vertical banners containing Chinese characters, such as "洪崖洞" (Hongyadong) and "解放碑" (Jiefangbei). The top left corner displays large calligraphy reading "重庆" above the English text "CHONGQING" and smaller Chinese text "山城雾都·江城重庆" alongside a red seal. The lighting is warm and cinematic, emphasizing the intricate textures of the miniature buildings, trees, and water, creating a tilt-shift photography effect.
